en_body:
Wondering stars shine through the blessed night
Their ribbons loosen dreams submerged in space
Caressing the hundred paths of humankind
The Season's night entreats forgiving Grace
A sacred hymn drifts weightless, far away
Ten-thousand dreams suspend their hope for Peace
Heaven shall never fail the righteous soul
Restoring all—yet trembling still remains
The Season of Love: God descends to earth
Precious Sutras, Scriptures welcomed thousandfold
This realm: an echo of the Realm of Blessed-Grace
We pray for all Humanity the Source of Glory!
note: The title echoes the Christmas hymn “O Holy Night,” while “Sutras, Scriptures” makes explicit the poem's Buddhist-Christian devotional braid.
